prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Renault-sourced F4R 2.0L turbo (engine code: F4Rt 874) with a fully built version featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.8:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a balanced crankshaft. Pair this with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe from TurboSmart, mated to a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 28 psi peak pressure on 98 RON fuel.

Drivetrain: Install a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part # QKE12R) in the Getrag M3G transaxle, paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (clamp load: 1,200 Nm) and a lightweight aluminum flywheel from Fidanza (10.5 lbs). Replace the stock half-shafts with custom CV-jointed units from The Driveshaft Shop (rated for 600+ hp).

Suspension & Handling: Fit Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV dampers, 8-position rebound, 20-way compression) with custom spring rates (front: 450 lbs/in, rear: 350 lbs/in) and spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro. Replace the stock anti-roll bars with adjustable units from Eibach (front: 24mm, rear: 22mm) and install polybushings from Powerflex (part # PFF5-401 for front control arms).
estetica: Aero: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit from KW Automotive (Europa S-specific, part # KW-121-WB), featuring extended front fenders, side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts. Add a custom front splitter from APR Performance (3D-molded carbon, 3-inch overhang) and a fixed rear wing from Voltex (Type 3, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord).

Wheels & Tires: Mount custom 3-piece forged wheels from BBS (LM-R II, 18x9.5 +35 front, 18x11 +40 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Use custom wheel spacers from H&R (15mm front, 25mm rear) to achieve flush fitment.

Interior & Details: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position buckets (part # 3812) mounted on custom aluminum brackets from Corbeau. Install a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards from Trimworks, paired with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip). Add a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch display) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in).
